purpose: Source-owned checklist for moving converted DX-WWW routes from source proof to rendered proof without running servers or builds in this lane.
approval_gate: Rendered proof requires explicit runtime approval before any local server, browser preview, hosted backend call, or long build is run.

routes.blocked_until: DX-WWW renderer snapshot approval is granted.

required_evidence.acceptance_note: Capture the /ui route through the approved DX-WWW renderer and attach the screenshot or artifact path.
Verify the shadcn favicon and copied vendor assets resolve from public/vendor without using upstream Next assets.
Record desktop and mobile layout checks for registry, gallery, docs, and boundary panels.
Confirm headings, route nav, table labels, and contrast remain readable in the rendered route.
Confirm Radix and React preview interactions stay marked as launch shims until implemented by DX-WWW.
Confirm source manifest, route discovery, visual audit, conversion manifest, receipt, and license notice remain linked.

routes.blocked_until: Runtime preview and Supabase credential approval are granted.

required_evidence.acceptance_note: Capture the /database route through the approved DX-WWW renderer and attach the screenshot or artifact path.
Verify the Supabase logo and copied vendor assets resolve from public/vendor without hosted Studio assets.
Record desktop and mobile layout checks for database, auth, storage, and runtime boundary panels.
Confirm headings, route nav, source tables, and administrative labels remain readable in the rendered route.
Confirm hosted auth, storage writes, Postgres mutations, and TanStack Query behavior stay marked as launch shims.
Confirm source manifest, route discovery, visual audit, conversion manifest, receipt, and Apache-2.0 notice remain linked.

routes.blocked_until: Runtime preview approval and license-sensitive Convex backend review are granted.

required_evidence.acceptance_note: Capture the /backend route through the approved DX-WWW renderer and attach the screenshot or artifact path.
Verify the Convex logo and copied vendor assets resolve from public/vendor without hosted dashboard assets.
Record desktop and mobile layout checks for functions, data, logs, files, and runtime boundary panels.
Confirm headings, route nav, source tables, and backend operation labels remain readable in the rendered route.
Confirm realtime sockets, function execution, OpenAPI clients, and deployment writes stay blocked until approved.
Confirm source manifest, route discovery, visual audit, conversion manifest, receipt, and FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0 notice remain linked.

real: Every converted route has a source-owned checklist for the evidence needed before rendered proof.
Studio and Zed can open the route page, source surface map, visual audit, manifest, and receipt from one checklist.
Runtime-verification lanes have an output target and schema for rendered-proof receipts.
A source-only validator reports missing runtime receipts as pending evidence while keeping source readiness green.
A blocked rendered-proof sample receipt shows the exact not-approved shape without fake screenshot or accessibility artifacts.
A rendered-proof import plan maps approved external receipts into their governed runtime-evidence targets without writing files in this lane.
A rendered-proof completeness reviewer summarizes the remaining 100/100 blockers without creating runtime proof.
A rendered-proof runtime approval request names the exact runtime capture scope before any server, build, credentialed backend, or evidence write is allowed.
A rendered-proof evidence authoring guide records required artifact fields while keeping every capture value null until runtime approval.
partial: The checklist and rendered-proof schema are source evidence only; no screenshot, accessibility scan, or responsive capture has been collected in this lane.
blocked: Renderer snapshots, backend credentials, realtime execution, and long verification remain approval-gated.
